head:
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/>
<title>Workplace Safety Fundamentals | The Obsidian Pulse</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<script id="tailwind-config">
        tailwind.config = {
            darkMode: "class",
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    colors: {
                        "on-error": "#690005",
                        "on-tertiary-container": "#c9fffe",
                        "surface-dim": "#131313",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed": "#002020",
                        "surface": "#131313",
                        "surface-tint": "#ffb3b3",
                        "primary": "#ffb3b3",
                        "inverse-primary": "#bf0030",
                        "primary-container": "#dc143c",
                        "secondary": "#ffb59c",
                        "secondary-container": "#8e2c01",
                        "on-surface-variant": "#e6bdbc",
                        "inverse-on-surface": "#313030",
                        "on-secondary-container": "#ffaa8d",
                        "surface-container-lowest": "#0e0e0e",
                        "inverse-surface": "#e5e2e1",
                        "on-primary-container": "#fff1f0",
                        "on-surface": "#e5e2e1",
                        "on-background": "#e5e2e1",
                        "surface-container-high": "#2a2a2a",
                        "surface-bright": "#3a3939",
                        "on-primary-fixed": "#40000a",
                        "primary-fixed-dim": "#ffb3b3",
                        "surface-container-highest": "#353534",
                        "on-secondary": "#5c1a00",
                        "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#920022",
                        "background": "#131313",
                        "secondary-fixed-dim": "#ffb59c",
                        "primary-fixed": "#ffdad9",
                        "tertiary-container": "#007d7d",
                        "tertiary-fixed": "#95f2f1",
                        "error-container": "#93000a",
                        "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#822800",
                        "surface-container": "#201f1f",
                        "tertiary": "#78d6d5",
                        "on-tertiary": "#003737",
                        "on-primary": "#680015",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#004f4f",
                        "on-secondary-fixed": "#380c00",
                        "surface-variant": "#353534",
                        "outline": "#ac8888",
                        "error": "#ffb4ab",
                        "secondary-fixed": "#ffdbcf",
                        "outline-variant": "#5c3f3f",
                        "surface-container-low": "#1c1b1b",
                        "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#78d6d5",
                        "on-error-container": "#ffdad6"
                    },
                    fontFamily: {
                        "headline": ["Space Grotesk"],
                        "body": ["Inter"],
                        "label": ["Inter"]
                    },
                    borderRadius: {"DEFAULT": "0.25rem", "lg": "0.5rem", "xl": "1.5rem", "full": "9999px"},
                },
            },
        }
    </script>
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 24;
            vertical-align: middle;
        }
        .glass-panel {
            background: rgba(28, 27, 27, 0.7);
            backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
        }
        .crimson-glow {
            box-shadow: 0 0 40px -10px rgba(220, 20, 60, 0.2);
        }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 8px; }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: #0e0e0e; }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #353534; border-radius: 4px; }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: #dc143c; }
    </style>
